title: 11 Herbal Creams For Acid Reflux
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains a compound called gingerol, which is a natural anti-inflammatory agent that helps to soothe the digestive system and reduce acid reflux symptoms. It also contains other beneficial compounds like zingerone and shogaol, which have anti-spasmodic and antioxidant properties that can help to calm the stomach and prevent symptoms of acid reflux like heartburn and bloating.
